title: Some Girls Do
writer: David D. Osborn, Liz Charles-Williams, Herman C. McNeile
actors: Richard Johnson, Daliah Lavi, Beba Loncar
plot: A series of unexplainable accidents befall the people and companies responsible for developing the world's first supersonic airliner (SST1). A British agent is sent to investigate and with the help of another agent uncovers a plot...
